mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_task (id, task_name, creator, creator_id, status, handler_type, export_params, export_file, file_size, error_message, created_time, start_time, completed_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{taskName}, #{creator}, #{creatorId}, #{status}, #{handlerType}, #{exportParams}, #{exportFile}, #{fileSize}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdTime}, #{startTime}, #{completedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE export_task SET status = #{status}, export_file = #{exportFile}, file_size = #{fileSize}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, start_time = #{startTime}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM export_task WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM export_task WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE export_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND start_time < #{cutoff}
